chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5772 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.25604/2024. 2. For hearing of main case. 21.01.2025 Mr. G.M. Bhutto, advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. The matter pertains to show cause notice dated 19.08.2024. Per learned counsel, it is successive notice in respect of the same cause as matter had attained finality in the earlier proceedings. Be that as it may, learned counsel submits that show cause notice shall be contested and seeks that the department to decide the same vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. Learned counsel further seeks that pending adjudication, as aforesaid, no further coercive action be taken against the petitioner. Learned DAG states that aforesaid seems reasonable and articulates no objection to the same. Accordingly, the petition is disposed of as aforesaid. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
